# Text Diff Viewer

> A free, 100% client-side web tool for comparing text differences in real-time.

## What it does

Text Diff Viewer lets you paste two texts side by side and instantly see what changed between them. No server, no signup, no data sent anywhere — everything runs in the browser.

## Key features

- **Unified view** (Git-style single column) and **Side-by-Side view** (two-column comparison)
- **Granularity options**: line-level, word-level, or character-level diffing
- **Normalization**: ignore case, ignore extra whitespace
- **Line numbers**: toggle on/off for easier navigation
- **Collapse unchanged**: hide large identical blocks to focus on differences
- **Export**: copy diff as plain text or download as a self-contained HTML file
- **PWA support**: works offline after first load
- **Multilingual**: English and Portuguese (Brazil)

## Use cases

- Comparing code snippets before and after a change
- Checking revisions in documents, emails, or essays
- Reviewing configuration file changes
- Spotting differences between two versions of any text

## Technology

Built with Next.js 13 (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and the `diff` library for accurate comparison.

## Links

- App: https://diff-viewer.vercel.app
- Source: https://github.com/obrenoalvim/diffViewer
